narrative:
Freedom Township (precinct in Wood County) has 962 registered voters, with 44.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points.
